languages.text: "Вы приписываете Нунциусу чрезмерную сентиментальность". {n}Эоганн смягчается.{/n} "Впрочем, утрата — неизменная часть человеческого опыта. Мы с Нунциусом ей тоже не чужды".
"You attribute excessive sentimentality to Nuncius." {n}Eogunn relents slightly.{/n} "However, loss is an unchangeable part of the human experience. Nuncius and I are no strangers to it."
languages.original_text: "Вы приписываете Нунциусу чрезмерную сентиментальность". {n}Эоганн смягчается.{/n} "Впрочем, утрата — неизменная часть человеческого опыта. Мы с Нунциусом ей тоже не чужды".

traits.locale_text: "You attribute excessive sentimentality to Nuncius." {n}Eogunn relents slightly.{/n} "However, loss is an unchangeable part of the human experience. Nuncius and I are no strangers to it."
"You attribute excessive sentimentality to Nuncius." {n}Eogunn relents slightly.{/n} "However, loss is an unchangeable part of the human experience. Nuncius and I are no strangers to it."
"You attribute excessive sentimentality to Nuncius." {n}Eogunn relents slightly.{/n} "However, loss is an unchangeable part of the human experience. Nuncius and I are no strangers to it."

languages.text: «Atribuye usted un sentimentalismo exacerbado a Nuncius». {n}A pesar de sus palabras, Eogunn acaba transigiendo.{/n} «Sin embargo, la pérdida es un aspecto extrapolable de la experiencia humana. Nuncius y yo estamos familiarizados con ella».
languages.original_text: "You attribute excessive sentimentality to Nuncius." {n}Eogunn relents slightly.{/n} "However, loss is an unchangeable part of the human experience. Nuncius and I are no strangers to it."

traits.locale_text: «Atribuye usted un sentimentalismo exacerbado a Nuncius». {n}A pesar de sus palabras, Eogunn acaba transigiendo.{/n} «Sin embargo, la pérdida es un aspecto extrapolable de la experiencia humana. Nuncius y yo estamos familiarizados con ella».

languages.text: “您把努恩修斯想得太过多愁善感了。”{n}伊奥贡的语气稍稍缓和了些。{/n}“不过，失去的确是人类经历中无法回避的一部分。我和努恩修斯对此并不陌生。”
languages.original_text: "You attribute excessive sentimentality to Nuncius." {n}Eogunn relents slightly.{/n} "However, loss is an unchangeable part of the human experience. Nuncius and I are no strangers to it."

traits.locale_text: “您把努恩修斯想得太过多愁善感了。”{n}伊奥贡的语气稍稍缓和了些。{/n}“不过，失去的确是人类经历中无法回避的一部分。我和努恩修斯对此并不陌生。”

languages.text: « Vous attribuez à Nuncius une sentimentalité excessive. » {n}Eogunn concède cependant :{/n} « Toutefois, le deuil fait intrinsèquement partie de la vie humaine. Nuncius et moi n'y avons pas échappé. »
languages.original_text: "You attribute excessive sentimentality to Nuncius." {n}Eogunn relents slightly.{/n} "However, loss is an unchangeable part of the human experience. Nuncius and I are no strangers to it."

traits.locale_text: « Vous attribuez à Nuncius une sentimentalité excessive. » {n}Eogunn concède cependant :{/n} « Toutefois, le deuil fait intrinsèquement partie de la vie humaine. Nuncius et moi n'y avons pas échappé. »

languages.text: "Nuncius'a aşırı duygusallık atfediyorsunuz." {n}Eogunn biraz yumuşuyor.{/n} "Ancak kayıp, insan deneyiminin değiştirilemez bir parçasıdır. Nuncius ve ben buna yabancı değiliz."
languages.original_text: "You attribute excessive sentimentality to Nuncius." {n}Eogunn relents slightly.{/n} "However, loss is an unchangeable part of the human experience. Nuncius and I are no strangers to it."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius'a aşırı duygusallık atfediyorsunuz." {n}Eogunn biraz yumuşuyor.{/n} "Ancak kayıp, insan deneyiminin değiştirilemez bir parçasıdır. Nuncius ve ben buna yabancı değiliz."

languages.text: 「あなたはヌンキウスに過剰な感傷を帰しています」{n}エオガンはわずかに態度を和らげた。{/n}「とはいえ、喪失は人間の経験の変わらぬ一部です。ヌンキウスも私も、それと無縁ではありません」
languages.original_text: "You attribute excessive sentimentality to Nuncius." {n}Eogunn relents slightly.{/n} "However, loss is an unchangeable part of the human experience. Nuncius and I are no strangers to it."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたはヌンキウスに過剰な感傷を帰しています」{n}エオガンはわずかに態度を和らげた。{/n}「とはいえ、喪失は人間の経験の変わらぬ一部です。ヌンキウスも私も、それと無縁ではありません」

languages.text: "Ihr schreibt Nuncius eine exzessive Sentimentalität zu." {n}Eogunn lenkt ein wenig ein.{/n} "Allerdings ist Verlust ein unabänderlicher Teil der menschlichen Existenz. Nuncius und mir ist das nicht fremd."
languages.original_text: "You attribute excessive sentimentality to Nuncius." {n}Eogunn relents slightly.{/n} "However, loss is an unchangeable part of the human experience. Nuncius and I are no strangers to it."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr schreibt Nuncius eine exzessive Sentimentalität zu." {n}Eogunn lenkt ein wenig ein.{/n} "Allerdings ist Verlust ein unabänderlicher Teil der menschlichen Existenz. Nuncius und mir ist das nicht fremd."
